hero.question: JD Vance diplomatic meeting with Iran by April 10?
hero.prob_take: At 17.5%, the crowd is pricing in roughly a 1-in-6 shot that Vance sits down with Iran before April 10, a timeline that assumes either diplomatic lightning strikes or the current Iran tensions cool faster than historical precedent suggests. The 22-point dump in 24 hours screams uncertainty about Vance's actual leverage and Iran's willingness to show up, but watch whether any back-channel signals emerge from the Gulf or whether sanctions policy gets softened as a negotiation bait.

daily_take.headline: Vance-Iran Meeting Odds Crater 22 Points. Market Pricing in Reality Check.
daily_take.deck: JD Vance diplomatic talks with Iran just tanked from 39.5% to 17.5% in 24 hours on $618K volume. The market is finally waking up to what everyone with a calendar already knew: April 10 is 11 weeks away and there's zero diplomatic runway. Short it further. This was a suckers' rally on inauguration hope. Smart money got out first.
